## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling/config/dependencies
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — adding/updating tests

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands run, flows exercised, etc. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manually verified in the browser (attach screenshots below for UI changes)

## Accessibility & performance

<!-- Skip this section if the PR has no user-facing/rendering changes -->

- [ ] Meets WCAG 2.2 AA (contrast, focus states, semantic landmarks, keyboard operability)
- [ ] Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` for any new animation
- [ ] No Core Web Vitals regressions (images via `next/image`, fonts via `next/font`, minimal new client JS)
- [ ] Page-level metadata added/updated where relevant (title, description, OG/Twitter)
